Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Health is present. Represented by Lolita Angeles.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Terrekk Owens , is present.
Attorney, John Weinstein, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of APR-12-2010 is vacated.
